name: Marimo
short_desc: Reactive Python notebooks and apps in a self-hosted web editor.
author: marimo-team
description: marimo is a reactive Python notebook stored as pure Python. This app starts a persistent marimo workspace in your browser so you can create, edit, and run notebooks from Docker.

form_fields.label: Notebook Password
form_fields.description: Password required to open the marimo editor.
form_fields.hint: Set a strong password. Marimo will require it before allowing access to the notebook UI.
